tasks.description: Create professional landing page with CasaOS logo, hero section, and feature descriptions
Implement multi-app YAML generator with dynamic services, ports, volumes, and environment variables
Add CasaOS metadata form with title, category, developer, tagline, description, and architectures
Implement CodeMirror YAML preview with real-time generation and editing capabilities
Add progress indicator showing current step in the multi-step process
Implement navigation flow between generator, icon, screenshots, and preview steps
Add icon upload functionality with PNG conversion and local storage
Add screenshot upload functionality with PNG conversion and local storage
Implement ZIP download feature with docker-compose.yml, icon.png, and screenshot files
Complete preview page with assets overview, YAML final editing, and export options
Ensure all pages are fully responsive and work on mobile and tablet devices
Implement dark/light theme toggle with localStorage persistence
Enhance code editor with proper YAML mode, syntax highlighting, and edit/save functionality
Add form validation and error messages for required fields and format checking
Test complete workflow from generator to ZIP download, validate YAML output
